overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of a futuristic corporate conference room from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily through a luxurious meeting space featuring marble floors, dark wood paneling, and glowing digital displays, eventually approaching an NPC with prominent cybernetic prosthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury corporate conference room with multiple meeting tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the expansive conference room, observing the modern furnishings and digital displays

entered.detail: long rectangular meeting table with white chairs and gold legs
digital display showing cyan data readouts and graphs
recessed rectangular panels emitting warm yellow light
large circular gold emblem mounted on the far wall
dark marble flooring with blue geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a spacious, high-end conference room. The camera moves forward past long meeting tables with white leather chairs, while digital screens on the walls display glowing cyan data. The room features dark wood paneling, recessed ceiling lighting, and a large corporate emblem visible on the far wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the far wall with server room visible

events.description: NPC character becomes visible standing near the far wall looking at a screen

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the conference room toward the far wall where an NPC is standing

notable_agents.action: standing still facing a wall-mounted digital screen

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass wall revealing an adjacent room
server racks and equipment visible through the glass partition

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves deeper into the room, the corporate emblem passes out of view and a glass partition wall comes into view on the right, revealing a server room behind it. An NPC character becomes visible in the distance standing near the far wall, facing a digital display. The camera continues its steady approach toward the figure.

scene_state.functional_zone: close approach to NPC and wall screen

events.description: camera slows significantly as it approaches the NPC character closely

agents.ego_description: slowing down to observe the NPC's cybernetic prosthetic legs and the wall screen they are viewing

notable_agents.action: standing with detailed cybernetic legs visible, wearing a blue coat and facing the wall screen

segments.scene_description: The camera slows as it approaches the NPC standing by the wall. The figure is revealed to have intricate cybernetic prosthetic legs and wears a blue coat. The camera moves past the character, showing the detailed mechanical components of their legs, while the glass partition and server room remain visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious corporate conference room that transitions from a wide architectural view to an intimate close-up of a cybernetic figure. It begins by gliding past long meeting tables with white leather chairs and glowing cyan data screens set against dark wood paneling and recessed lighting. As the camera moves deeper into the space, the corporate emblem on the far wall recedes and a glass partition opens up on the right to reveal a server room, while a distant figure comes into view. The scene then shifts focus toward this individual in a blue coat, with the camera slowing its pace to highlight the intricate mechanical components of their prosthetic legs. Finally, the movement carries the viewer past the character, maintaining the view of the server room as the shot concludes.
